audit_registry.read_policy: Read first for recursive audit workflow, registry files, completion criteria, and pruning policy.

audit_backlog.read_policy: Use for active backlog, next-up order, stable debt ids, scanner counts, app-wide error-management follow-up, and documentation hygiene follow-up; historical detail lives in passes.jsonl/files.jsonl.

audit_doc_summaries.read_policy: Use for compact read/skip policies before opening long markdown docs.

audit_doc_versions.read_policy: Use for durable doc version metadata and read policies.

audit_rules.read_policy: Use for active/watch/archived recursive audit rules, including widget catalog updates, realtime stream lifecycle constraints, branded error UI requirements, Firestore rules emulator-test workflow, event-policy/event-success in-development preservation, and error catalogue maintenance.

controller_patterns.read_policy: Read for controller/view-model boundary rules and realtime stream lifecycle ownership before architecture or state-management cleanup.

action_cardinality_policy.read_policy: Read before adding or changing user-visible actions, callables, relationship documents, mutation CTAs, list/rail surfaces, or product limits.

lib_code_map.read_policy: Read before broad lib/ feature work; use it to find feature-level README owners and cross-cutting architecture docs.

event_policies_readme.read_policy: Read before deleting, moving, wiring, or auditing lib/event_policies; this marks the event-policy bundle migration, preview fixtures, cancellation/settlement policy axis, and dev-only lab as intentional in-development code.

safety_readme.read_policy: Read before changing blocking, reporting, account deletion, safety retention, or deletion/anonymization behavior.

user_profile_readme.read_policy: Read before changing private profile identity fields, profile edit UI, public projection inputs, or profile schema migration.

event_success.read_policy: Read before deleting, moving, wiring, auditing, or QA-ing lib/event_success, event-success Firestore collections, Functions, scorecards, participant metrics, or manual QA surfaces.

event_success_theatrical_experience_trac.read_policy: Read when planning or implementing Event Success live ceremony polish, invite-loop polish, private afterglow recap artifacts, or branded audio follow-ups.

docs_index.read_policy: Read before adding, deleting, or consolidating docs.

error_handling_audit.read_policy: Use as the current app-wide error-management source of truth, backend migration checklist, frontend/local error-management playbook, app error catalogue, descriptor contract, naming convention, and branded error surface guidance; refresh with dart tool/audit/backend_error_candidates.dart before new backend error work and create the app-wide scanner before frontend/local migration.

data_contracts.read_policy: Read before Firestore rules, Functions mutation boundaries, schema-source tooling, Dart/TypeScript model generation, callable validation schemas, seed validation, relationship documents, data migrations, or rules test execution.

backend_operation_catalog.read_policy: Read before changing repository writes, callable interfaces, trigger-owned projections, server-only collections, Firestore rules for write paths, or notification fan-out.

project_context.read_policy: Use as the high-level repo map; prefer audit registry and focused docs for pass-specific rules.

repo_readme.read_policy: Use for self-serve setup/runbook context; re-check scripts before giving commands.

firebase_readme.read_policy: Read before changing Firebase environment config, App Check, project aliases, native/web config files, or deploy prerequisites.

ui_architecture.read_policy: Read before changing shared screen padding, tab body insets, sliver-native screens, NestedScrollView tabs, sticky headers, scroll ownership, or scroll-heavy widget tests.

widget_catalog.read_policy: Use as widget inventory and update it when widget APIs, ownership models, sliver/tab structures, or reusable design-system roles materially change.

host_tooling_consolidation_tracker.read_policy: Use while consolidating host tools, host palette, event management, attendance, and backend-ready host action exposure.

public_profile_overhaul_tracker.read_policy: Use only while closing remaining cardless public-profile UX work: profile prompt picker, compatibility expansion, quality coaching, visual regression coverage, device QA, and visible swipe-language cleanup.

config_cicd_platform_audit.read_policy: Use only while closing remaining config, CI/CD, platform, observability, contract-source, and environment-codegen follow-ups from the 2026-05-21 hardening pass.

release_operations.read_policy: Read before changing CI workflows, Firebase deploy ordering, release gates, environment setup, store readiness, or release evidence.

marketing_app_media_pipeline.read_policy: Read before changing website screenshot slots, marketing capture manifests, host vertical media, or app-derived marketing asset sync checks.

marketing_landing_page_research.read_policy: Read before redesigning the Catch marketing site, changing launch landing-page content, selecting website imagery, or applying website-derived brand direction to the app theme; this doc supersedes the rejected run-only preview.

marketing_landing_page_tracker.read_policy: Use while the marketing landing-page research, rejected isolated preview, corrected preview, production rewrite, and app visual-direction follow-up remain open.

location_stack.read_policy: Read before changing location permissions, Maps SDK/Places, run coordinates, check-in geofencing, map navigation, or map/demo readiness.

demo_data_seeding.read_policy: Read before changing demo seeding, demo ops, warm accounts, beta data cleanup, or demo validation.

sales_demo_persona_cohorts.read_policy: Read before changing synthetic persona cohort size, market coverage, NYC/India persona scope, batch waves, roster reuse, or city overlay policy.

sales_demo_image_generation_runbook.read_policy: Read before generating, reviewing, downloading, normalizing, uploading, or publishing synthetic persona images for sales-grade demo data.

sales_demo_seed_tracker.read_policy: Read before changing sales-grade synthetic personas, host demo seed quality, image generation pilots, persona catalog migration, or high-fidelity demo acceptance criteria.
